• Loads audio and MIDI files to create a synchronized sampler-player system.
  • Uses Tone.js Sampler to trigger audio notes and midi-player-js to parse MIDI events.
  • Provides play, pause, and restart controls with visual feedback.
    async function initSampler(url) {
    async function initMIDI(data) {

This web app allows users to upload custom audio and MIDI files or use defaults. It maps MIDI note events to trigger audio playback using Tone.js Sampler, while midi-player-js parses the MIDI file. The interface provides real-time control and status updates.
